message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Create User Profile

actor User
participant "API Gateway" as APIG
participant "Auth-Service" as AUTH
participant "User-Service" as USR

User -> APIG : POST /api/users
APIG -> AUTH : check authorization
AUTH --> APIG : http_status: 200
APIG -> USR : POST /api/users
USR --> APIG : http_status: 200
APIG --> User : profile created..

@enduml
```
